title: Item updated when a form matching item name is submitted
excerpt: I would like to create a form that is used when I already have an item created. The form would then update specific columns on the matching item that is already created, if the item names match in the form and on the boa…

posts.author: ashleyME (Ashley M)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to create a form that is used when I already have an item created. The form would then update specific columns on the matching item that is already created, if the item names match in the form and on the board.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ashleyME,

Welcome to the community

You can check out the Duplicates and Uniques app. It can do exactly that.

Here is a demo of how.

If you have any questions, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: ashleyME (Ashley M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kolaai , I’m hoping monday can create a simple automation for this. We aretrying to limit our expensise and the number of accounts and platforms we are using.

Thank you!
